posts.title: A Cinematic Mandap Under the Jaipur Sky
posts.excerpt: Gold drapery, 360° projection, and a 12-piece live ensemble — a wedding production years in the making.
posts.content: Three days in Jaipur. Eighteen tons of rigging. A handcrafted mandap lit by 240 fixtures synchronised to a custom score. This is how we approached one of the most ambitious luxury weddings of the season — from concept to show-call.

posts.title: Curved LED Wall: Building a 40m Centerpiece
posts.excerpt: How we engineered a seamless 4K curved LED backdrop for a global tech summit in Mumbai.
posts.content: Three weeks of pre-production. A custom curved truss system. P2.5 modules colour-matched on-site. Here's the complete production breakdown.

posts.title: Choreographing 32 Lasers for a Stadium Tour
posts.excerpt: Designing a laser show that's safe, breathtaking, and perfectly timed to every drop.
posts.content: 32 RGB lasers. 60,000 audience members. One show-call cue list. We unpack the lighting design philosophy behind a full stadium-scale tour.

posts.title: Runway, Reimagined: A Fashion Show in Light
posts.excerpt: A 60-meter mirrored runway, kinetic lighting, and a custom-built finale moment.
posts.content: Behind the scenes of a Bengaluru couture week show that pushed our kinetic rig further than any production before it.

posts.title: An Intimate Ceremony on a Goan Cliff
posts.excerpt: Soft pastels, ambient string lighting, and a sunset that did most of the work.
posts.content: Sixty guests. One cliffside. A production approach designed to disappear into the landscape.

posts.title: A Brand Launch That Felt Like a Premiere
posts.excerpt: Tier-1 line array, an immersive product reveal, and a custom 9-screen LED façade.
posts.content: How we transformed a hotel ballroom into a cinema-grade product reveal experience for a global brand.

posts.title: A Modular Festival Stage in 72 Hours
posts.excerpt: Two stages, six bands, one production crew working around the clock.
posts.content: Our load-in/load-out playbook for a multi-stage music festival in Lonavala.

posts.title: Color Stories: Gradient Lighting & Emotional Arcs
posts.excerpt: How we use color temperature shifts to guide an audience through a 4-hour ceremony.
posts.content: A practical guide to designing lighting that supports — not competes with — your storytelling.

posts.title: Case Study: A 3-City Tech Summit Tour
posts.excerpt: Identical brand experience across Mumbai, Delhi, and Bengaluru — in 14 days.
posts.content: Logistics, crew planning, and the systems we built to ship a consistent show across three cities.

posts.title: Behind the Decor: 11,000 Stems in 9 Hours
posts.excerpt: A floral install timelapse, plus the rigging plan that made it possible.
posts.content: A backstage look at the install process for a luxury wedding floral takeover.

settings.tagline: Plan smartly. Organize perfectly. Execute flawlessly.
